Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Denied

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is OFF CALENDAR. The hearing date fails to comply with CCP 1167.4(a), which requires "the time for making the motion shall not be less than three days nor more than seven days after the filing of the notice."

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. No Proof of Service on file.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
